description: A plain, undesigned candid operational photograph from an ICE arrest operation in Los Angeles tied to an SBA COVID-19 fraud case. Two law enforcement officers in black tactical gear escort a detained woman down a suburban residential sidewalk, all shown from behind. The officer on the left wears a balaclava and a black vest reading 'POLICE / IRS-CI' (IRS Criminal Investigation); the officer on the right is a woman in a black vest reading 'POLICE / FEDERAL AGENT' with a holstered sidearm and duty belt. The detainee in the center wears a long black cardigan, light blue jeans, and tan slip-on shoes, and is being held by both arms. The background shows a tree-lined street with parked cars and a flatbed trailer under an overcast sky. There is no on-image text, graphic overlay, agency seal, or design treatment — it is a documentary news-style photo. Not a meme/designed graphic.
notable_text: On-image text only as printed on vests: 'POLICE IRS-CI', 'POLICE FEDERAL AGENT'.
